title: Bare Bones x Exposure
description: Retextures the Exposure mod to match the Bare Bones Resource Pack
body:
## Instruction
Bare Bones x Exposure retextures all the textures from the Exposure mod. It acts to make the [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) mod match the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)  Resource Pack
![:3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LSr4Sret/images/92de96058aca11fce12c265cf3502b73017377a7.png)
